THE MOTION APPEARS TO BE SEEKING MANDATORY RELIEF UNDER CCP 473(B), HOWEVER IT IS NOT ACCOMPANIED BY "AN ATTORNEY'S SWORN AFFIDAVIT ATTESTING TO HIS OR HER MISTAKE, INADVERTENCE, SURPRISE OR NEGLECT" AS REQUIRED BY CCP 473(B). calendar.matters:
Defendant Kelly Ryan'S Motion To Set Aside Default And Vacate Default Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-28-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Courtcall:
Denise Leadbetter, Esq., 415-680-0023, appearing for Barney Dimaos, Plaintiff
Elisabeth Heck, Esq., 415-865-9204, appearing for Kelly Ryan, for Defendant.
Court reporter: PeggyTsujimoto CSR #5229. Email: p2gmoto@earthlink.net

ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's notes). Ms. Leadbetter provided case background and requested $16,640.00 in attorney's fees. Ms. Heck stated that the fee requested is ridiculous.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the modified tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant Kelly Ryan'S Motion To Set Aside Default And Vacate Default Judgment is GRANTED. Ms. Leadbetter to prepare a form of order that addresses her request for attorney fees. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, reported (D501)

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Sep-28-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT KELLY RYAN's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is Transferred to be heard in Department 501 on the same date at 9:30 a.m. That department handles all real property cases per SF Local Rule 8.10(A)(1).

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-26-2020 Off Calendar

Motion For Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-25-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Kelly P. Ryan.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Denise Ann Leadbetter, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Barney Diamos, who was placed under oath and testified.
Elisabeth Anne Heck, Esq. appeared with defendant Kelly P. Ryan, who was placed under oath but did not testify.
Both Ms. Heck and Ms. Ryan appeared via CourtCall for this morning's proceedings.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Ejectment was filed on April 9, 2020, and personally served on defendant Kelly P. Ryan on April 15, 2020.
Default as to defendant Kelly P. Ryan was filed on June 4, 2020.
DOE defendants were dismissed on June 15, 2020.
Defendant Kelly P. Ryan's Motion to Set-Aside the Default was filed on July 24, 2020.
Order DENYING defendant Kelly P. Ryan's Motion to Set-Aside the Default was filed on August 19, 2020.

Plaintiff Barney Diamos submits the following exhibit for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Lease Agreement signed May 1, 2008.........................................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Barney Diamos, and against the defaulted defendant Kelly P. Ryan, as follows:

Costs - $800.00.

Total - $800.00.

Additionally, plaintiff Barney Diamos is entitled to possession of the premises located at 221 Clayton Street, San Francisco, CA 94117.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default
Off Calendar Aug-19-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Allen Koster, (415) 690-0023, for Plaintiff Barney Diamos. via CourtCall
Elisabeth Heck, (415) 865-9204, for Defendant Kelly Ryan. via CourtCall

Hearing is held and ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the ruling as modified.

DEFENDANT KELLY RYAN'S Motion To Set Aside Default is DENIED without prejudice. The motion appears to be seeking mandatory relief under CCP 473(b), however it is not accompanied by "an attorney's sworn affidavit attesting to his or her mistake, inadvertence, surprise or neglect" as required by CCP 473(b). Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: W. Trupek, Not Reported (D501)
